description_long: This is a small, brown bird with a compact body and a short, conical beak. Its plumage is predominantly brown with darker streaks and mottling across the back, wings, and head, providing excellent camouflage in urban and natural environments. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the tail is relatively short and slightly rounded at the tip. The legs are slender and appear to be a muted pinkish or brownish color. The bird's overall form is streamlined, with subtle feather layering visible along the flanks and back. Its size and features suggest it is a common passerine, well-adapted to city parks, gardens, and streets.
description: A small, brown, streaked bird with a short conical beak and a slightly rounded tail, featuring mottled plumage and slender legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's compact body, streaked brown plumage, and short beak.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded tail and the symmetrical feather pattern on the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same streaked plumage and the bird's streamlined profile.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the head, short beak, and the subtle mottling on the crown.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Mottled and streaked with dark brown and beige across the back, wings, and head
